subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, Who, through His complete power and all-embracing grace, hath brought forth creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بقدره کامله و عنایت منبسطه خلق فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
